results.emptyHint: To display data, add at least one Option and one Parameter
results.emptyGeneral: Compare Options by criteria and choose the best. Works for products, services, vacation spots, cars, real estate, and more
results.emptyVariants: Options are what you compare. For example: iPhone 15, Samsung Galaxy S24, Xiaomi 14 for a smartphone. Or Maldives, Turkey, Greece for a vacation. A dress, jumpsuit, coat for an outfit. Three cafés for a meetup spot. Add 2–5 Options.
results.emptyParams: Parameters are what you compare by. For example: price, quality, design, functionality, reliability. Set each Parameter importance from 1 to 10.
